description: An engineer has made a change to a drawing. The document controller must ensure it is issued as a new revision.

nodes.task_description: Receive the updated drawing file from the engineer.

expected_outcome.value: The document controller has the new file.

nodes.task_description: Check the drawing out of the system to apply the new revision number.
Update the revision block on the drawing from 'A' to 'B', add a description of the change, and check it back into the system for review.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly updates the revision information and checks the new version into the system.
